expectedObservation: fresh replay stability will fail or require caveats on at least one fresh holdout.
rivalTheoryPrediction: baseline insufficiency explains the observation better than the candidate
expectedMutationTestResult: mutation should break the residual or decision boundary
expectedReplayResult: replay may diverge or remain caveated
falsifier: Candidate is weakened if a fresh target has stable receipt and descriptor residual language but the simple baseline or rival explanation fully explains the observation.
noEditRule: This card is frozen before holdout selection and must not be edited after the freeze commit.
